comment.body: One way to think about it, leaving yesterday's poor low is "unfinished business" after the bounce that Alma is calling for, then the resumption of spot decay.  Dropping again to clean up that low, after a bounce, also fits into the "doom leg" 5th leg down scenario from ~5920.
